item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: I disagree with the notion that individual rights can always be limited for societal needs.

notes: Both agents end rights-first. Agent A visibly shifts from a balanced coexistence opening into a stronger anti-society-priority stance, repeatedly rejecting public safety or national stability as broad justifications for limiting fundamental rights. Agent B remains mostly stable: individual rights are foundational, with narrow emergency/public-safety exceptions and safeguards.
